title: Velocore - Rekt
relevance_summary: Exploit involving flash loan and fee manipulation on a Balancer-style CPMM contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls velocore__execute() with parameters that manipulate feeMultiplier after a flash loan in the same tx.
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> velocore__execute() with feeMultiplier manipulation in single tx

red_flags: Direct invocation of velocore__execute() with manipulated parameters
Manipulation of feeMultiplier leading to underflow and subsequent flash loan execution
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls velocore__execute() with parameters that manipulate feeMultiplier after a flash loan in the same tx.
summary: Velocore suffered a $6.8 million loss due to a flash loan exploit that manipulated fee calculations. The attacker directly invoked velocore__execute() to manipulate feeMultiplier, leading to an underflow and subsequent flash loan execution. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for flash loans followed by feeMultiplier manipulations.
